name: sam_local_invoke
description:
Locally invokes a Lambda function using AWS SAM CLI.

Requirements:
- AWS SAM CLI MUST be installed and configured in your environment
- Docker must be installed and running in your environment.

This command runs your Lambda function locally in a Docker container that simulates the AWS Lambda environment.
Use this tool to test your Lambda functions before deploying them to AWS. It allows you to test the logic of your function faster.
Testing locally first reduces the likelihood of identifying issues when testing in the cloud or during deployment,
which can help you avoid unnecessary costs. Additionally, local testing makes debugging easier to do.

Returns:
    Dict: Local invoke result and the execution logs

project_directory.description: Absolute path to directory containing the SAM project
project_directory.title: Project Directory

resource_name.description: Name of the Lambda function to invoke locally
resource_name.title: Resource Name

template_file.description: Absolute path to the SAM template file (defaults to template.yaml)
template_file.title: Template File

event_file.description: Absolute path to a JSON file containing event data
event_file.title: Event File

event_data.description: JSON string containing event data (alternative to event_file)
event_data.title: Event Data

environment_variables_file.description: Absolute path to a JSON file containing environment variables to pass to the function
environment_variables_file.title: Environment Variables File

docker_network.description: Docker network to run the Lambda function in
docker_network.title: Docker Network

container_env_vars.description: Environment variables to pass to the container
container_env_vars.title: Container Env Vars

parameter.description: Override parameters from the template file
parameter.title: Parameter

log_file.description: Absolute path to a file where the function logs will be written
log_file.title: Log File

layer_cache_basedir.description: Directory where the layers will be cached
layer_cache_basedir.title: Layer Cache Basedir
